verdict: Pure mechanical tool with no skincare ingredients; functions through physical scraping action on tongue. Safety is excellent with food-grade materials, though oral wellness is tangential to skincare.

_research.name: Stainless Steel Tongue Scraper
pros: Reduces oral bacteria and improve breath
Complements skincare routine with holistic wellness
_research.con: Oral hygiene tool, not a facial skincare product; limited relevance to skin health.
